author: blueheron786
description: Efficiently calculates and caches word counts for notes, with folder exclusion. Uses cache to avoid recalculating word counts for unchanged notes.

manifest.author: Blue Heron
manifest.description: Efficiently calculates and caches word counts for notes, with folder exclusion. Uses cache to avoid recalculating word counts for unchanged notes.
manifest.name: Efficient Word Count

name: Efficient Word Count

releases.author: blueheron786
releases.description:
[manifest.json](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/20826265/manifest.json)
The first release of the plugin! 

- Exposes an object `window.wordCountCache` with a couple of methods, notably `.total()`, to get the total number of words across all notes.
- Caches the word count in memory and on disk, and efficiently updates it as notes are updated
- Loads quite fast, even with lots of notes and changes
- Allows customization (exclusion of files and folders) via settings

It loads quite fast. With 17k words spanning 81 notes, the loading time is averages around 320ms (without file caching, around 591ms) on a decent development machine.
